allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; "---procs---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { \(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess\).ProcessName } catch { "pid $\($_.OwningProcess\) gone" } } | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell($ready=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 40; $i++\) { if \(Test-Path "d:\\taxi-v4-modifie\\taxi-v4\\.devserver.log"\) { $log = Get-Content "d:\\taxi-v4-modifie\\taxi-v4\\.devserver.log" -Raw; if \($log -match "Ready in|started server|Local:\\s+http"\) { $ready=$true; break } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; "ready=$ready"; "---log tail---"; if \(Test-Path "d:\\taxi-v4-modifie\\taxi-v4\\.devserver.log"\) { Get-Content "d:\\taxi-v4-modifie\\taxi-v4\\.devserver.log" -Tail 20 })
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; "TSC_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $out | Select-Object -First 30; $b = npm run build 2>&1; "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $b | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; "TSC_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $out | Select-Object -First 30; $b = npm run build 2>&1; "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $b | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|Failed|✓ Compiled|✓ Generating" | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell($b = npm run build 2>&1; "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $b | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|Failed|Type error|✓ Compiled|✓ Generating|warn" | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell($b = npm run build 2>&1; "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $b | Select-String -Pattern "error|Failed|Type error|✓ Compiled|✓ Generating" | Select-Object -First 8)
PowerShell($b = npm run build 2>&1; "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $b | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|Failed|Type error|Parsing|✓ Compiled|✓ Generating" | Select-Object -First 30)
PowerShell($b = npm run build 2>&1; "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $b | Select-String -Pattern "Failed|Type error|✓ Compiled" | Select-Object -First 5)
PowerShell($b = npm run build 2>&1; "BUILD_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; $b | Select-String -Pattern "Failed|Type error|Parsing|✓ Compiled|✓ Generating" | Select-Object -First 6)
